title: sphaerostigma dentatum subsp. campestris
intro: Sphaerostigma dentatum subsp. campestris, also known as the Western Australian kidney plant, is a sub-species of Sphaerostigma dentatum, a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
